understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to complete the KA59 puzzle game by solving each level: in every level, move and/or switch between selectable pieces so that all goal tiles marked `+` are occupied by selectable pieces at the same time, producing a WIN state, and ultimately win the full run by clearing all levels within the step budget.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (UP/DOWN/LEFT/RIGHT) shift the currently selected piece by one cell (3 pixels) in that direction unless blocked by walls/boundaries or constrained by object interactions. Some adjacent objects can be pushable blocks, allowing the selected piece to push them if there is space; walls generally prevent movement. Multiple selectable pieces can exist, and control is switched using CLICK on the exact pixel/grid coordinates of another selectable (matching the coordinates shown in state), after which movement applies to that newly selected piece. The movement_blocked flags are only hints about adjacency and do not guarantee success/failure.
